users.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
users.editProfileDescription: Update your personal information and profile picture.
users.joinUsDescription: Join us by creating your account! Unlock a world of possibilities and exclusive features...
users.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your account email and we'll send you a secure link to set a new password.

users.confirmationEmailSent: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}. Please check your inbox and click the link to change your email address.
users.notificationPreferencesDescription: Choose which notifications you want to receive.
